title: Zygia flexicaulis

This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Zygia flexicaulis belonging to the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. Within the Caesalpinioideae subfamily, Zygia flexicaulis is part of the tribe Cassieae. The tribe Cassieae is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions.
